---
name: Content correction / accuracy
about: Report a factual error, outdated detail, unsupported claim, or broken link
title: "[fix] "
labels: correction
---

<!-- Accuracy is the core promise of this repo (no fabrication). Please cite a source. -->

## Page

Which file/page? (e.g. `protocols/kerberos.md`, or a link)

## What's wrong

Quote the exact claim or describe the broken link/diagram.

## Correct information + source

What should it say, and what's the authoritative source (RFC, vendor doc, standards body)?
A claim without a citable source can't be added (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`).

## Notes

- [ ] This is a factual/source issue (not a personal opinion).
- [ ] I checked it isn't already flagged with "verify" or "not specified in sources".
